violations.description: REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with tight fitting lids. (lids are up)
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor inside walkin cooler and walkin freezer noted in need of cleaning. Ceiling vent cover in front service area needs cleaning.
PLUMBING SYSTEM (1 pts): Leaking faucet noted at three compartment sink needs repair. (losing a large amount of hot water over time)
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lid is up)
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some light covers noterd in need of cleaning. Floor inside both walkins noted in need of cleaning.
